user.name: Sarah Chen
user.title: Theatre Costume Designer
user.bio: Passionate costume designer with 8 years of experience creating compelling character narratives through clothing. Specializing in period productions and contemporary adaptations of classical works. Based in Chicago, working with major regional theatres.

portfolio.title: Sarah Chen - Costume Designer
portfolio.tagline: Bringing characters to life through authentic costume design

pages.title: About
pages.content:
I'm a costume designer driven by the belief that clothing tells stories before actors speak their first lines. My work spans classical theatre, contemporary drama, and experimental works, always with a focus on historical accuracy and character authenticity.

Based in Chicago, I collaborate with directors and actors to create costumes that serve both the narrative and the performer. From Shakespeare to Sondheim, I bring eight years of professional experience and a deep love for theatrical storytelling to every production.

pages.title: Theatre Work
pages.content: Recent theatre productions showcasing period accuracy and character development through costume design.

projects.title: Hamlet - Chicago Shakespeare Theater
projects.description: Elizabethan court costumes emphasizing the decay of Danish nobility. Rich fabrics gradually deteriorate throughout the play, mirroring the moral corruption of the court.

projects.title: Macbeth - Steppenwolf Theatre
projects.description: Dark, supernatural interpretation featuring weather-worn fabrics and organic textures. The witches' costumes used hand-distressed materials to suggest otherworldly origins.

projects.title: Romeo & Juliet - Goodman Theatre
projects.description: Renaissance-inspired designs with a modern color palette. Juliet's costumes transition from innocence to tragedy through color and silhouette evolution.

pages.title: Current Projects
pages.content: Work in progress and behind-the-scenes glimpses of the costume design process.

projects.title: Hamlet (Modern Dress) - Victory Gardens
projects.description: Contemporary adaptation setting the Danish court in modern corporate America. Business suits become armor, power ties become nooses.

pages.title: Process
pages.content: Behind-the-scenes look at costume design from concept to completion.
